PR

Execute the following steps:

- use the smartmic python environment
- run full test suite
- check the README.md and the copilot instructions and update if needed
- create PR from this branch to main and include a PR description
- store PR description here: F:\GitHub\napari-czitools\.github\pr_decriptions

Release

- use the smartmic python environment
- run full test suite
- check the README.md and the copilot instructions and update if needed
- create an new release based on main branch
- store release notes here: F:\GitHub\napari-czitools\RELEASE_NOTES
- do the release based on the main branch to push the new package to PyPi
